message:
style(highlight): drop unused .peekable() in format_regex_pattern_manual

The iterator only ever calls .next() (twice — once for the outer loop
header at line 311 and once inside the backslash-escape branch at line
314). It never calls .peek(), so wrapping the iterator in
.peekable() was dead capability that just allocated a Peekable shell
around chars().

Caught by clippy::unused_peekable. No behavioral change.
